evidence_summary: Round167 R9 Loop-10 case for AUTONOMOUS_ROBOTAXI_DEPLOYMENT; demand recovery, hybrid, tourism, freight, eVTOL, and space labels are separated from OPM, FCF, unit economics, certification, and backlog evidence.

company_name: Tesla Texas robotaxi wait-time and routing reality check
evidence_summary: Round167 R9 Loop-10 case for ROBOTAXI_OPERATIONAL_REALITY_CHECK; demand recovery, hybrid, tourism, freight, eVTOL, and space labels are separated from OPM, FCF, unit economics, certification, and backlog evidence.
false_positive_reason: long_wait_time; limited_service_area; misrouting_flag; dropoff_distance_issue_flag; safety_monitor_flag; poor_completion_rate
notes: Robotaxi rollout is not scalable evidence if wait times, routing reliability, completion rate, or safety-monitor dependence fail. Sources: round_167.md Reuters Tesla Texas robotaxi wait times.

evidence_summary: Round167 R9 Loop-10 case for ROBOTAXI_SAFETY_REGULATORY_OVERLAY; demand recovery, hybrid, tourism, freight, eVTOL, and space labels are separated from OPM, FCF, unit economics, certification, and backlog evidence.
notes: Robotaxi scale cannot stay Green if safety recall and weather-handling failures break operational trust. Sources: round_167.md Reuters Waymo flooded-road recall.
